content.rendered:
UMTC as an organization provides advisory services for the entire project life cycle, i.e., from conceptualization, planning and design to implementation, operation and maintenance of urban transport projects.

We are committed towards delivering efficient and sustainable solutions to our clients through policy formulation, planning and designing in the form of accessibility and mobility solutions, such as mobility plans, transit-oriented development (TOD) plans, public transport plans for city bus services, bus rapid transit (BRT) systems, monorails, metro systems and inland waterways. We provide implementation and hand-holding support, along with capacity building services, to various authorities and ULBs engaged in providing urban transport services. Additionally, UMTC engages in managing outsourced transport operations.
